overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long CRCL Daily ETF (CRCG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Circle Internet Group, Inc. (CRCL) stock, less fees and expenses. CRCG was launched on Aug 11, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
